stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Is this configuration compliant with the international regulations?

options.a: Compliant with the regulations stated in ICAO Annex 14.
options.b: Non-compliant because the stopway must be narrower than the runway.
options.c: Compliant only if the stopway is not included in the ASDA, as it is the same width as the runway.
options.d: Non-compliant because the TODA must always include the stopway if it is present.
